name: resource-pathways
description: Aggregates public pathway and gene-set databases including Reactome, Gene Ontology, MSigDB, and KEGG.

resources.label: Reactome
resources.description: Curated biological pathway and reaction knowledgebase via Reactome Content and Analysis services.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Pathway keyword, Reactome stable ID, or identifier list for analysis.

parameters.name: species
parameters.description: Reactome species filter, default Homo sapiens.

parameters.name: identifiers
parameters.description: Newline/comma separated genes/proteins for overrepresentation analysis.

resources.label: Gene Ontology
resources.description: Structured GO terms for biological process, molecular function, and cellular component via QuickGO.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GO keyword or GO:nnnnnnn term ID.

resources.label: MSigDB
resources.description: Molecular Signatures Database gene-set collections for GSEA, including Hallmark, GO, Reactome, and KEGG-derived sets.
riskNotes: Read-only public MSigDB pages/JSON endpoints; respect Broad/MSigDB terms for redistribution.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Gene-set name keyword or exact MSigDB set name.

parameters.name: collection
parameters.description: Optional MSigDB collection filter, e.g. H, GO:BP, CP:REACTOME.

resources.label: KEGG
resources.description: KEGG REST API for pathway maps, gene-pathway links, modules, compounds, reactions, enzymes, diseases, and drugs.
riskNotes: KEGG REST API is available for academic use by academic users; commercial use may require licensing.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Pathway keyword, KEGG ID, or source ID for link/conv workflows.

parameters.name: organism
parameters.description: KEGG organism code for pathway listing, default hsa.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Optional operation mode: list, find, link, conv, info, ddi.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Target database for link/conv, e.g. pathway, genes, ncbi-geneid, uniprot.

parameters.name: option
parameters.description: Optional get/find format such as kgml, json, aaseq, formula, exact_mass.

interface.shortDescription: Reactome, Gene Ontology, MSigDB, and KEGG pathway/gene-set retrieval
interface.longDescription: Aggregates public pathway and gene-set resources for Search / Query / Fetch: Reactome pathway search and enrichment analysis, Gene Ontology term lookup through QuickGO, MSigDB gene-set search/detail, and KEGG REST pathway workflows adapted from the referenced kegg-database skill.
defaultPrompt: Search Reactome, Gene Ontology, MSigDB, or KEGG for apoptosis pathways.
Fetch a KEGG pathway ID, Reactome stable ID, GO term, or MSigDB gene set through the pathway plugin.
